scope.summary: C9 adds a rig lane that extracts the setup-printed onboarding client snippets from real oraclemcp output and executes those snippets verbatim against the installed artifact.
out_of_scope: Fixing the HTTP Claude snippet to carry bearer/header material; bead oraclemcp-091-b10-snippet-auth-header-4lit2 owns the green half.
Reintroducing or validating secure stdio snippets; current setup output does not print a secure_stdio client snippet.
Running a live Oracle profile; this fixture uses the synthetic setup profile and asserts MCP initialize/tool discovery only.

entry_points.name: bash -n scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.sh && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.py
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The shell entrypoint parses and the Python raw JSON-RPC/HTTP runner compiles without importing oraclemcp crates or MCP helper libraries.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.sh xfail --dry-run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The dry run scheduled installed-artifact setup and snippet truth assertions without running cargo or touching services.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 900 -- bash scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.sh run --log
entry_points.trace: Expected-red on 2026-07-22 at source 0e4821a46c0e08cad88870180bb61a9ec3928bc0. The runner installed oraclemcp from git archive HEAD, extracted snippets from real setup output, then proved claude_mcp_json and codex_config_toml initialized over raw stdio while http_client_credentials.claude_mcp_add failed raw HTTP initialize with 401 client_credential_required. Scrubbed artifact: tests/artifacts/evidence/ws-c-red-runs/oraclemcp-091-c9-snippet-truth-00gb2.json.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 900 -- bash scripts/rig/onboarding_snippet_truth.sh xfail --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22 at source 0e4821a46c0e08cad88870180bb61a9ec3928bc0. The expected-failure mode observed the same printed HTTP Claude snippet failure and exited green for this fixture-close convention.

limitations: The full workspace gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight pane changes.
The HTTP service test binds the setup-printed loopback endpoint 127.0.0.1:7070; a future port-policy change should update setup output and this extractor together.
The runner executes setup-printed client snippets only. It does not execute installer, service-manager mutation, Docker, Homebrew, winget, or validation-command examples.
